# Extracao: jv email 2

- **Fonte:** jv email 2.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Hi <firstname>,

Jeff Walker and Mike Merz here... we just want to
bring you up-to-speed on the upcoming product
launch for the Glazer-Kennedy "Copy That Sells"
product.

First off, we are planning on going into pre-
launch on Wednesday, October 11th. 

The launch day is one week later, on Wednesday,
October 18th. 

This will be a one-week launch, with a big push
through October 24th. There will be a BIG bonus
package that will go away after the one-week
launch period.

You will note that pre-launch is going to be one
week long. Since the product launch landscape is
SO crowded this month, we decided to go with a
shorter, more intense pre-launch... that will help
us maintain the market's focus.

That's it for now - we just wanted to make sure
you had the dates. We will be sending you more
information (including your links and access to
your JV control panel) in the next few days.


best regards,
Jeff and Mike
